prompt: Tap cutoff seat before range-bucket action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before range decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Cutoff is the seat anchor because this earlier late-position seat frames whose range is applying pressure first.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The cutoff is the correct anchor because the earlier late-position seat frames whose range is applying pressure before the bucket choice.
